arts.ttl: Man City plan incredible gesture for Kevin De Bruyne after midfielder revealed he will depart following ten years at the club
arts.sum: Manchester City are set to honour Kevin De Bruyne with a statue after the midfielder announced the end of his 10-year career at the club.

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Man Utd star Andre Onana's wife 'has 62k bag and Rolex stolen' in horrifying ordeal
arts.sum: Melanie Kamayou, the wife of Manchester United goalkeeper Andre Onana, was robbed on the street in Alderley Edge, Cheshire, of an expensive handbag and a Rolex watch

arts.ttl: Post-Omar Marmoush Eintracht Frankfurt target big finish to 2024/25
arts.sum: The departure of Marmoush after an incredible 15 goals in 17 appearances was one that no fan of the Eagles would have wanted to come at that time, yet it was one that the squad, Toppmöller's coaching staff and supporters accepted with great grace as they warmly saluted the Egyptian's efforts at Deutsche Bank Park ahead of the 2-0 win over Borussia Dortmund on Matchday 18 . Eintracht Frankfurt have adjusted admirably to the departure of star striker Omar Marmoush to Manchester City in the January transfer window, with stars like Mario Götze and Hugo Ekitiké coming to the fore this spring.

arts.ttl: Roy Keane leaves Gary Neville in stitches with brutal Man Utd jibe to Luke Littler
arts.sum: Former Manchester United captain Roy Keane has not been shy about criticising his old club and he took the visit of Luke Littler as a chance to crack a few jokes

arts.ttl: Kevin De Bruyne: MLS club has 'right' to Man City star as San Diego drop out
arts.sum: Kevin De Bruyne will leave Manchester City in July and an unnamed MLS club reportedly hold the “rights” to negotiate a deal this summer. Kevin De Bruyne: MLS club has 'right' to Man City star as San Diego drop out

arts.ttl: Kevin De Bruyne reveals his favourite-ever teammate
arts.sum: Kevin De Bruyne will leave Manchester City at the expiration of his contract this summer, calling time on his trophy-laden ten-year spell with the club. However that game goes, De Bruyne’s legacy as an all-time Manchester City and Premier League great is secured.

arts.ttl: Is De Bruyne the best midfielder in Premier League history?
arts.sum: A FIFA World Cup winner in 2010, Fabregas won two titles at Stamford Bridge, among his five major trophies in English football, and finished his Premier League career with 50 goals in 350 matches across his two clubs. The second oldest outfield player to play in the Premier League, making his final appearance aged 40 years five months and seven days, one-club man Giggs also tops the list for assists with 162 and is third for all-time appearances with 632 and third for goals from midfield with 109.

arts.ttl: Why Manchester United winger Alejandro Garnacho has put his house up for sale
arts.sum: Alejandro Garnacho joined Man United from the Atletico Madrid academy in 2020 and is under contract until 2028.

arts.ttl: Daniel Levy could ‘ignore Tottenham fans’ and go all-in with Man City on £400m plot
Man United learn new asking price for Liverpool transfer target after '£42m rejection'
arts.sum: Manchester United have been tipped to return to the negotiation table, despite having a bid for midfielder Ederson rejected last summer
